topic: 紀伊半島 山岳信仰
query: Mountain shrines in the Kii Peninsula.
reasoning: RULE A applied — scored the data returned, not the tool choice. RULE C applied — authoritative Wikidata heritage data (Kongōbu-ji, Kumano Kodō) is genuine and relevant to mountain faith, but scope is incomplete: the Kii Peninsula spans Wakayama, Mie, and Nara, yet only Wakayama was queried. Constraint_handling and intent_understanding both drop to 3 for this geographic gap; per RULE B only the single worst-affected dim (constraint_handling) is scored strictly at 3. The browse_advisory correctly surfaces search_area(山岳信仰 / 修験道) as canonical alternatives, which aids the agent.
missing_data: Mie and Nara prefecture mountain-faith sites on the Kii Peninsula (e.g. Yoshino-Omine, Nachi Grand Shrine, Hongū Grand Shrine, Hayatama Grand Shrine) — the three Kumano Grand Shrines that anchor Kii Peninsula mountain worship are absent because Mie/Nara were not queried.
improvement_hint: When the query toponym is 'Kii Peninsula' (紀伊半島), the server should fan out to all three constituent prefectures (Wakayama + Mie + Nara) automatically, or return a scope_note indicating the multi-prefecture nature of the peninsula so the agent knows to issue additional calls.
